displayTitle: Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle
synopsis: Return to Vader’s Castle is the spine-tingling sequel to Tales From Vader’s Castle. Enjoy more spooky vibes with even more of your favorite diabolical villains from every edge of the Star Wars universe. Written by none other than Cavan Scott with an art style that will raise the hairs on your arms.
title: Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle
